name: 4q24_TET2_flanking_SD
description: 4q24 region containing TET2 (DNA hydroxymethylase). Short flanking SDs and TET-family paralog homology (TET1 on 10q21, TET3 on 2p13) create mapping ambiguity at the DSBH/CD catalytic core. Recurrent somatic TET2 loss-of-function in myeloid malignancies and clonal hematopoiesis (CHIP).

architecture.internal_structure: Short flanking SDs (~10-20 kb each); TET2 catalytic DSBH domain shares 50-65% protein identity with TET1 and TET3 on other chromosomes; no large local CNV in healthy population.
